title: Decoder
description:
All the First Order messages are sent using an encryption scheme. You have cracked their code and must write a program to decode their messages. Their code works as follows. The table below is used to replace all of the vowels in the original message (plaintext) with a different vowel to create the encrypted message.

Original a e i o u y
Replacement y a e i o u
input: A positive integer, n, on the first line. After the first line there will be n lines of encrypted text.

samples.input:
4
Wa most fend ynd dastriu Loka
Skuwylkar, bafira ha bacimas
ynithar Ibe-Wyn.
- Kuli Ran
samples.output:
We must find and destroy Luke
Skywalker, before he becomes
another Obi-Wan.
- Kylo Ren

source: School, PLU High School Programming Contest, PLU 2016, Novice
